title: Send notification to someone except when they created the item
excerpt: I have a board that tracks task requests. I want the board to send a new item notification to someone unless they created the item themself. Perhaps it would work if I could use the data stored in the Creation Log column…

posts.author: QuinnC (Quinn Colter)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board that tracks task requests. I want the board to send a new item notification to someone unless they created the item themself. Perhaps it would work if I could use the data stored in the Creation Log column in the automation? But this isn’t possible yet.

Making a new column with lot of custom, person-specific automations (as suggested here) isn’t a scalable long-term solution.
